tests_run: Pre-write identity gate passed for RUN_ROOT, RUN_ID, PLAN_SHA256, and interp RT2 resolution artifact.
Numeric table hashes matched Phase 7 scenario-fix artifact_manifest.csv and interp-fix recorded hashes.
Wording scan reviewed guarded occurrences of robust/support/favorable/IPV-specific/effect-null language in active corrected reports.
CSV consistency audit confirmed primary N=53, controls matching/exceeding primary, failed degradation controls, S1/S2 duplication, S3 n=6, and no interpretable state q<=0.10.

key_evidence.RT2-BLOCK-001: Closed: controls match/exceed primary and failed degradation controls are stated in active reports; no IPV-specific signal claimed.
key_evidence.RT2-BLOCK-002: Closed: replication2 corrected N=53 reproduced reported-alpha refit delta Spearman +0.136833 and independent-tuned favorable direction +0.054669.
key_evidence.RT2-BLOCK-003: Closed: S1/S2 duplicate primary N=53; S3 n=6 null/reverse; safe-subset robustness claim removed.
key_evidence.RT2-BLOCK-004: Closed: wording downgraded to suggestive/nonsignificant/non-generalizing/non-IPV-specific and not a proven-null claim.

spec_deviations: No fixes, plotting, heavy recompute, or Tier decision were performed.
START_HERE.md was not changed because this closure re-check did not change canonical operating facts.
main_workflow.log was appended to satisfy repository workflow logging policy; RT3 research artifacts remain confined to the requested RT3 directory plus append-only artifact_index.csv.
